mapper.select: SELECT s_no FROM clandb.ct WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND server_name = #{serverName} LIMIT 1
SELECT clan_money FROM clandb.ct WHERE clan_zang = #{clanZang}
mapper.update: UPDATE clandb.ct SET clan_money = #{clanMoney} WHERE clan_zang = #{clanZang}
UPDATE clandb.ct SET cpoint = #{cpoint}, sod_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE clan_name = #{clanName}
UPDATE clandb.ct SET clan_money = clan_money + #{amount} WHERE clan_name = #{clanName}
UPDATE clandb.ct SET clan_zang = #{newZang} WHERE clan_zang = #{oldZang}
